entity.summary: Hedera decentralized exchange and DeFi suite providing automated-market-maker swaps and liquidity pools within a broader network of on-chain products.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies HbarSuite as an audited Hedera AMM DEX, links the first-party hsuite.finance domain, and reports substantial current TVL plus non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume. Confidence is medium because detailed first-party documentation was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: HbarSuite official website
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party domain is linked from the current protocol registry and preserves the HbarSuite product identity.

evidence.title: HbarSuite protocol metrics and information
evidence.notes: Current profile classifies HbarSuite as an audited Hedera AMM DEX and reports current TVL and non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day exchange volume.
